text.title: Feature Flags Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for feature-flags.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the runtime support flag evaluation AND is exposure risk non-trivial?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — no central runtime to flip
SKIP — flag adds overhead without payoff
BLOCK — move side effects out of evaluation
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Web SaaS + checkout change → first two branches do not match → owner+expiry set → pure evaluation → not kill-switch needed → cleanup queued → all_gates_green=true → APPROVE.
